name: whatsapp-suporte-extensao
description: Extensao Chrome com API local para atendimento compartilhado no WhatsApp Web.

scripts.status: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3333/health' | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { Write-Output 'API offline' }"
scripts.port: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3333 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess"
